bitcoin://example.org/ |- | [[:en:FTPS|FTPS]] || ftps:// || ftps://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Geo URI|Geo URI]] || geo: || geo:37.786971,-122.399677 |- | [[:en:Git (software)|Git]] || git:// || git://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Gopher (protocol)|Gopher]] || gopher:// || gopher://example.org |- | [[:en:Hypertext Transfer Protocol|Hypertext Transfer Protocol]] || http:// || http://example.org |- | [[:en:Magnet URI scheme|Magnet URI scheme]] || magnet:// || magnet://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Multimedia Messaging Service|Multimedia Messaging Service]] || mms:// || mms://example.org/ |- | [[:en:NASA World Wind|NASA World Wind]] || worldwind:// || worldwind://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Network News Transfer Protocol|Network News Transfer Protocol]] || nntp:// || nntp://example.org/ |- | [[Secure Shell]] || ssh:// || ssh://example.org/ |- | Secure [[Session Initiation Protocol]] || sips:// || sips://example.org/ |- | [[Session Initiation Protocol]] || sip:// || sip://example.org/ |- | [[Short Message Service]] || sms:// || sms://example.org/ |- | [[:en:SSH File Transfer Protocol|SSH File Transfer Protocol]] || sftp:// || sftp://example.org/ |- | Telephone || tel:// || tel://example.org/ |- | [[Telnet]] || telnet:// || telnet://example.org/ |- | [[Uniform resource name]] || urn: || urn:isbn:0451450523 |- | [[XMPP]] || xmpp:// || xmpp://example.org/ |- |} == Hiding link icons == A link icon can be hidden with the {{code|plainlinks}} class or {{tl|Plain link}}, but this is not advisable. http://example.org/test.pdf == Custom link icons == Custom icons can be added by editing [[Special:MyPage/skin.css]] (current skin only) or [[Special:MyPage/common.css]] (all skins). For example, to add an icon for Excel files: #content a[href$=".xls"].external, #content a[href$=".XLS"].external, #content a[href$=".xlsx"].external, #content a[href$=".XLSX"].external { background: url("http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/ba/Page_white_excel.png") center right no-repeat; padding-right: 18px; } When successfully updated, this link will show an Excel icon: :http://example.org/test.xls The markup detects file extensions .xls or .xlsx with both upper and lower case. The image must be 16 pixels wide. The image link must be from http://upload.wikimedia.org. To get this link, go to the file page and click on the image to open it without the file description, then copy the URL. To remove a default icon, simply add the CSS with no URL. For example, to remove the padlock icon when viewing secure links: #content a[href ^="https://"].external { background: center right no-repeat; padding-right: 18px; } To remove all the default icons, use this CSS: #content a.external { background: none !important; padding: 0 !important; } == Bugs == * [[:bugzilla:20024|bug 20024]] - a destination-dependent icon should be shown for interwiki links * [[:bugzilla:30682|bug 30682]] - Link icon inconsistencies when using protocol relative URLs * [[:bugzilla:45891|bug 45891]] - External link icons should have alt text * [[:bugzilla:54604|bug 54604]] - Large number of CSS rules for external links * [[:bugzilla:61178]] - Remove yellow padlock icons on HTTPS links ([[MediaWiki_talk:Vector.css/Archive_1#Padlock_for_secure_links|related discussion for Enwiki]]) * [[:bugzilla:63521]] - Default external link icons should be a module == See also == {{commonscat|External link icons}} * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking#Non-English-language sites]] * [[Help:Link#External links]] * [[Wikipedia:External links]] == Notes == {{notelist|refs= {{efn|name=common.css|The default PDF icon is a generic document icon, but is changed to [[File:Icon pdf file.png]] through [[MediaWiki:Common.css|Common.css]].}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia link help]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{imbox | type = notice | name = info | text = In the default skin on desktop ([[mw:Skin:Vector|Vector]]), en.Wikipedia uses only two external link icons; one for [[:en:PDF|PDF]] documents and the other for all other external links. Some other skins use additional icons. }}{{Wikipedia how to}} {{ombox | image = [[File:Gnome-applications-science.svg|42px]] | text = You can test how this page looks in the different skins with these links:
{{select skin}}
}}{{Linking and page manipulation|linking and diffs}} External links usually display an icon at the end of the link. CSS is used to check for certain [[:en:Filename extension|Filename extension]]s or [[URI scheme]]s and apply an icon specific to that file type, based on the selected [[Wikipedia:Skin|skin]].For example, [[WP:MONOBOOK|Monobook]] uses https://en.wikipedia.org/w/resources/src/mediawiki.skinning/images/external-ltr.svg and Vector uses https://en.wikipedia.org/w/skins/Vector/resources/common/images/external-link-ltr-icon.svg This page contains example URLs to demonstrate the link icons. The displayed icon only depends on the URL itself. It is not checked whether a file of that type is actually at the link. The examples here do not link to real files. == Explanation == [[:en:MediaWiki|MediaWiki]] software detects [[URI scheme]]s and/or [[:en:Filename extension|Filename extension]]s to create a link; thus links without a URI will not have an external link applied. MediaWiki does not attempt to detect any part of the URL to create a link, such as {{code|www}}, which many websites do not use in the URL. The standard Wikipedia skin, ''[[WP:Vector|Vector]]'', shows only PDF icons, as does ''Cologne Blue''. ''Modern'', ''MonoBook'' and ''Timeless'' show a full set of filename extensions icons and some URI scheme icons; ''Minerva'' (mobile) shows none. Icons are defined in the CSS for each skin except for the PDF icon, which is displayed if ''"pdf"'' is anywhere in the filename extension.{{efn|name=common.css}} Filename extension icons are displayed only if the extension matches the text. Filename extension icons have precedence over URI scheme icons. Internet Explorer may show an empty space or misplaced icon if the page is rendered with a line wrap inside the link text. Link icons do not adhere to [[:en:MOS:ACCESS|accessibility standards]], since alt text cannot be added. == Example == {| class="wikitable" ! colspan=3 style="text-align:center;font-size:90%;font-weight:normal;"| [[File:Gnome-applications-science.svg|left|38px]] '''Use these links to view this page with a different skin:'''
{{select skin}} |- ! Type !! File extension !! Sample link |- | [[:en:Portable Document Format|Portable Document Format]] || .pdf .PDF, .pdf# .PDF# .pdf? .PDF? || http://example.org/test.pdf |- | [[:en:Audio Video Interleave|Audio Video Interleave]] || .avi .AVI || http://example.org/test.avi |- | [[:en:MPEG-1|MPEG-1]] || .mpg .MPG .mpeg .MPEG || http://example.org/test.mpg |- | [[:en:Ogg|Ogg]] || .ogm .OGM || http://example.org/test.ogm |- | [[:en:MIDI|MIDI]] || .MID .midi .MID || http://example.org/test.mid |- | [[:en:MP3|MP3]] || .MP3 || http://example.org/test.mp3 |- | [[:en:Ogg Vorbis|Ogg Vorbis]] || .OGG || http://example.org/test.ogg |- | [[:en:WAV|Waveform Audio File Format ]] || .WAV* || http://example.org/test.wav |- | [[Windows Media Audio]] || .wma .WMA || http://example.org/test.wma |- ! Type !! URI scheme !! Sample link |- | [[:en:Internet Relay Chat|Internet Relay Chat]] || irc:// ircs:// || irc://example.org |- | [[:en:File Transfer Protocol|File Transfer Protocol]] || ftp:// || ftp://example.org |- | [[:en:Network News Transfer Protocol|Network News Transfer Protocol]] || news: || news:example.org |- | [[:en:Mailto|Mailto]] || mailto: || mailto:example@example.org |- | [[:en:HTTP Secure|HTTP Secure]] || https:// || https://example.org/test.html |- | [[:en:Apache Subversion|Apache Subversion]] || svn:// || svn://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Bitcoin|Bitcoin]] || bitcoin:// || bitcoin://example.org/ |- | [[:en:FTPS|FTPS]] || ftps:// || ftps://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Geo URI|Geo URI]] || geo: || geo:37.786971,-122.399677 |- | [[:en:Git (software)|Git]] || git:// || git://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Gopher (protocol)|Gopher]] || gopher:// || gopher://example.org |- | [[:en:Hypertext Transfer Protocol|Hypertext Transfer Protocol]] || http:// || http://example.org |- | [[:en:Magnet URI scheme|Magnet URI scheme]] || magnet:// || magnet://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Multimedia Messaging Service|Multimedia Messaging Service]] || mms:// || mms://example.org/ |- | [[:en:NASA World Wind|NASA World Wind]] || worldwind:// || worldwind://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Network News Transfer Protocol|Network News Transfer Protocol]] || nntp:// || nntp://example.org/ |- | [[Secure Shell]] || ssh:// || ssh://example.org/ |- | Secure [[Session Initiation Protocol]] || sips:// || sips://example.org/ |- | [[Session Initiation Protocol]] || sip:// || sip://example.org/ |- | [[Short Message Service]] || sms:// || sms://example.org/ |- | [[:en:SSH File Transfer Protocol|SSH File Transfer Protocol]] || sftp:// || sftp://example.org/ |- | Telephone || tel:// || tel://example.org/ |- | [[Telnet]] || telnet:// || telnet://example.org/ |- | [[Uniform resource name]] || urn: || urn:isbn:0451450523 |- | [[XMPP]] || xmpp:// || xmpp://example.org/ |- |} == Hiding link icons == A link icon can be hidden with the {{code|plainlinks}} class or {{tl|Plain link}}, but this is not advisable. http://example.org/test.pdf == Custom link icons == Custom icons can be added by editing [[Special:MyPage/skin.css]] (current skin only) or [[Special:MyPage/common.css]] (all skins). For example, to add an icon for Excel files: #content a[href$=".xls"].external, #content a[href$=".XLS"].external, #content a[href$=".xlsx"].external, #content a[href$=".XLSX"].external { background: url("http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/ba/Page_white_excel.png") center right no-repeat; padding-right: 18px; } When successfully updated, this link will show an Excel icon: :http://example.org/test.xls The markup detects file extensions .xls or .xlsx with both upper and lower case. The image must be 16 pixels wide. The image link must be from http://upload.wikimedia.org. To get this link, go to the file page and click on the image to open it without the file description, then copy the URL. To remove a default icon, simply add the CSS with no URL. For example, to remove the padlock icon when viewing secure links: #content a[href ^="https://"].external { background: center right no-repeat; padding-right: 18px; } To remove all the default icons, use this CSS: #content a.external { background: none !important; padding: 0 !important; } == Bugs == * [[:bugzilla:20024|bug 20024]] - a destination-dependent icon should be shown for interwiki links * [[:bugzilla:30682|bug 30682]] - Link icon inconsistencies when using protocol relative URLs * [[:bugzilla:45891|bug 45891]] - External link icons should have alt text * [[:bugzilla:54604|bug 54604]] - Large number of CSS rules for external links * [[:bugzilla:61178]] - Remove yellow padlock icons on HTTPS links ([[MediaWiki_talk:Vector.css/Archive_1#Padlock_for_secure_links|related discussion for Enwiki]]) * [[:bugzilla:63521]] - Default external link icons should be a module == See also == {{commonscat|External link icons}} * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking#Non-English-language sites]] * [[Help:Link#External links]] * [[Wikipedia:External links]] == Notes == {{notelist|refs= {{efn|name=common.css|The default PDF icon is a generic document icon, but is changed to [[File:Icon pdf file.png]] through [[MediaWiki:Common.css|Common.css]].}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia link help]]

The image must be 16 pixels wide. The image link must be from http://upload.wikimedia.org. To get this link, go to the file page and click on the image to open it without the file description, then copy the URL. To remove a default icon, simply add the CSS with no URL. For example, to remove the padlock icon when viewing secure links: #content a[href ^="https://"].external { background: center right no-repeat; padding-right: 18px; } To remove all the default icons, use this CSS: #content a.external { background: none !important; padding: 0 !important; } == Bugs == * [[:bugzilla:20024|bug 20024]] - a destination-dependent icon should be shown for interwiki links * [[:bugzilla:30682|bug 30682]] - Link icon inconsistencies when using protocol relative URLs * [[:bugzilla:45891|bug 45891]] - External link icons should have alt text * [[:bugzilla:54604|bug 54604]] - Large number of CSS rules for external links * [[:bugzilla:61178]] - Remove yellow padlock icons on HTTPS links ([[MediaWiki_talk:Vector.css/Archive_1#Padlock_for_secure_links|related discussion for Enwiki]]) * [[:bugzilla:63521]] - Default external link icons should be a module == See also == {{commonscat|External link icons}} * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking#Non-English-language sites]] * [[Help:Link#External links]] * [[Wikipedia:External links]] == Notes == {{notelist|refs= {{efn|name=common.css|The default PDF icon is a generic document icon, but is changed to [[File:Icon pdf file.png]] through [[MediaWiki:Common.css|Common.css]].}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia link help]]

revision.text:
{{imbox | type = notice | name = info | text = In the default skin on desktop ([[mw:Skin:Vector|Vector]]), en.Wikipedia uses only two external link icons; one for [[:en:PDF|PDF]] documents and the other for all other external links. Some other skins use additional icons. }}{{Wikipedia how to}} {{ombox | image = [[File:Gnome-applications-science.svg|42px]] | text = You can test how this page looks in the different skins with these links:
{{select skin}}
}}{{Linking and page manipulation|linking and diffs}} External links usually display an icon at the end of the link. CSS is used to check for certain [[:en:Filename extension|Filename extension]]s or [[:en:URI scheme|URI scheme]]s and apply an icon specific to that file type, based on the selected [[Wikipedia:Skin|skin]].For example, [[WP:MONOBOOK|Monobook]] uses https://en.wikipedia.org/w/resources/src/mediawiki.skinning/images/external-ltr.svg and Vector uses https://en.wikipedia.org/w/skins/Vector/resources/common/images/external-link-ltr-icon.svg This page contains example URLs to demonstrate the link icons. The displayed icon only depends on the URL itself. It is not checked whether a file of that type is actually at the link. The examples here do not link to real files. == Explanation == [[:en:MediaWiki|MediaWiki]] software detects [[:en:URI scheme|URI scheme]]s and/or [[:en:Filename extension|Filename extension]]s to create a link; thus links without a URI will not have an external link applied. MediaWiki does not attempt to detect any part of the URL to create a link, such as {{code|www}}, which many websites do not use in the URL. The standard Wikipedia skin, ''[[WP:Vector|Vector]]'', shows only PDF icons, as does ''Cologne Blue''. ''Modern'', ''MonoBook'' and ''Timeless'' show a full set of filename extensions icons and some URI scheme icons; ''Minerva'' (mobile) shows none. Icons are defined in the CSS for each skin except for the PDF icon, which is displayed if ''"pdf"'' is anywhere in the filename extension.{{efn|name=common.css}} Filename extension icons are displayed only if the extension matches the text. Filename extension icons have precedence over URI scheme icons. Internet Explorer may show an empty space or misplaced icon if the page is rendered with a line wrap inside the link text. Link icons do not adhere to [[:en:MOS:ACCESS|accessibility standards]], since alt text cannot be added. == Example == {| class="wikitable" ! colspan=3 style="text-align:center;font-size:90%;font-weight:normal;"| [[File:Gnome-applications-science.svg|left|38px]] '''Use these links to view this page with a different skin:'''
{{select skin}} |- ! Type !! File extension !! Sample link |- | [[:en:Portable Document Format|Portable Document Format]] || .pdf .PDF, .pdf# .PDF# .pdf? .PDF? || http://example.org/test.pdf |- | [[:en:Audio Video Interleave|Audio Video Interleave]] || .avi .AVI || http://example.org/test.avi |- | [[:en:MPEG-1|MPEG-1]] || .mpg .MPG .mpeg .MPEG || http://example.org/test.mpg |- | [[:en:Ogg|Ogg]] || .ogm .OGM || http://example.org/test.ogm |- | [[:en:MIDI|MIDI]] || .MID .midi .MID || http://example.org/test.mid |- | [[:en:MP3|MP3]] || .MP3 || http://example.org/test.mp3 |- | [[:en:Ogg Vorbis|Ogg Vorbis]] || .OGG || http://example.org/test.ogg |- | [[:en:WAV|Waveform Audio File Format ]] || .WAV* || http://example.org/test.wav |- | [[Windows Media Audio]] || .wma .WMA || http://example.org/test.wma |- ! Type !! URI scheme !! Sample link |- | [[:en:Internet Relay Chat|Internet Relay Chat]] || irc:// ircs:// || irc://example.org |- | [[:en:File Transfer Protocol|File Transfer Protocol]] || ftp:// || ftp://example.org |- | [[:en:Network News Transfer Protocol|Network News Transfer Protocol]] || news: || news:example.org |- | [[:en:Mailto|Mailto]] || mailto: || mailto:example@example.org |- | [[:en:HTTP Secure|HTTP Secure]] || https:// || https://example.org/test.html |- | [[:en:Apache Subversion|Apache Subversion]] || svn:// || svn://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Bitcoin|Bitcoin]] || bitcoin:// || bitcoin://example.org/ |- | [[:en:FTPS|FTPS]] || ftps:// || ftps://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Geo URI|Geo URI]] || geo: || geo:37.786971,-122.399677 |- | [[:en:Git (software)|Git]] || git:// || git://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Gopher (protocol)|Gopher]] || gopher:// || gopher://example.org |- | [[:en:Hypertext Transfer Protocol|Hypertext Transfer Protocol]] || http:// || http://example.org |- | [[:en:Magnet URI scheme|Magnet URI scheme]] || magnet:// || magnet://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Multimedia Messaging Service|Multimedia Messaging Service]] || mms:// || mms://example.org/ |- | [[:en:NASA World Wind|NASA World Wind]] || worldwind:// || worldwind://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Network News Transfer Protocol|Network News Transfer Protocol]] || nntp:// || nntp://example.org/ |- | [[Secure Shell]] || ssh:// || ssh://example.org/ |- | Secure [[Session Initiation Protocol]] || sips:// || sips://example.org/ |- | [[Session Initiation Protocol]] || sip:// || sip://example.org/ |- | [[Short Message Service]] || sms:// || sms://example.org/ |- | [[:en:SSH File Transfer Protocol|SSH File Transfer Protocol]] || sftp:// || sftp://example.org/ |- | Telephone || tel:// || tel://example.org/ |- | [[Telnet]] || telnet:// || telnet://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Uniform resource name|Uniform resource name]] || urn: || urn:isbn:0451450523 |- | [[:en:XMPP|XMPP]] || xmpp:// || xmpp://example.org/ |- |} == Hiding link icons == A link icon can be hidden with the {{code|plainlinks}} class or {{tl|Plain link}}, but this is not advisable. http://example.org/test.pdf == Custom link icons == Custom icons can be added by editing [[Special:MyPage/skin.css]] (current skin only) or [[Special:MyPage/common.css]] (all skins). For example, to add an icon for Excel files: #content a[href$=".xls"].external, #content a[href$=".XLS"].external, #content a[href$=".xlsx"].external, #content a[href$=".XLSX"].external { background: url("http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/ba/Page_white_excel.png") center right no-repeat; padding-right: 18px; } When successfully updated, this link will show an Excel icon: :http://example.org/test.xls The markup detects file extensions .xls or .xlsx with both upper and lower case. The image must be 16 pixels wide. The image link must be from http://upload.wikimedia.org. To get this link, go to the file page and click on the image to open it without the file description, then copy the URL. To remove a default icon, simply add the CSS with no URL. For example, to remove the padlock icon when viewing secure links: #content a[href ^="https://"].external { background: center right no-repeat; padding-right: 18px; } To remove all the default icons, use this CSS: #content a.external { background: none !important; padding: 0 !important; } == Bugs == * [[:bugzilla:20024|bug 20024]] - a destination-dependent icon should be shown for interwiki links * [[:bugzilla:30682|bug 30682]] - Link icon inconsistencies when using protocol relative URLs * [[:bugzilla:45891|bug 45891]] - External link icons should have alt text * [[:bugzilla:54604|bug 54604]] - Large number of CSS rules for external links * [[:bugzilla:61178]] - Remove yellow padlock icons on HTTPS links ([[MediaWiki_talk:Vector.css/Archive_1#Padlock_for_secure_links|related discussion for Enwiki]]) * [[:bugzilla:63521]] - Default external link icons should be a module == See also == {{commonscat|External link icons}} * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking#Non-English-language sites]] * [[Help:Link#External links]] * [[Wikipedia:External links]] == Notes == {{notelist|refs= {{efn|name=common.css|The default PDF icon is a generic document icon, but is changed to [[File:Icon pdf file.png]] through [[MediaWiki:Common.css|Common.css]].}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia link help]]

The standard Wikipedia skin, ''[[WP:Vector|Vector]]'', shows only PDF icons, as does ''Cologne Blue''. ''Modern'', ''MonoBook'' and ''Timeless'' show a full set of filename extensions icons and some URI scheme icons; ''Minerva'' (mobile) shows none. Icons are defined in the CSS for each skin except for the PDF icon, which is displayed if ''"pdf"'' is anywhere in the filename extension.{{efn|name=common.css}} Filename extension icons are displayed only if the extension matches the text. Filename extension icons have precedence over URI scheme icons. Internet Explorer may show an empty space or misplaced icon if the page is rendered with a line wrap inside the link text. Link icons do not adhere to [[:en:MOS:ACCESS|accessibility standards]], since alt text cannot be added. == Example == {| class="wikitable" ! colspan=3 style="text-align:center;font-size:90%;font-weight:normal;"| [[File:Gnome-applications-science.svg|left|38px]] '''Use these links to view this page with a different skin:'''
{{select skin}} |- ! Type !! File extension !! Sample link |- | [[:en:Portable Document Format|Portable Document Format]] || .pdf .PDF, .pdf# .PDF# .pdf? .PDF? || http://example.org/test.pdf |- | [[:en:Audio Video Interleave|Audio Video Interleave]] || .avi .AVI || http://example.org/test.avi |- | [[:en:MPEG-1|MPEG-1]] || .mpg .MPG .mpeg .MPEG || http://example.org/test.mpg |- | [[:en:Ogg|Ogg]] || .ogm .OGM || http://example.org/test.ogm |- | [[:en:MIDI|MIDI]] || .MID .midi .MID || http://example.org/test.mid |- | [[:en:MP3|MP3]] || .MP3 || http://example.org/test.mp3 |- | [[:en:Ogg Vorbis|Ogg Vorbis]] || .OGG || http://example.org/test.ogg |- | [[:en:WAV|Waveform Audio File Format ]] || .WAV* || http://example.org/test.wav |- | [[:en:Windows Media Audio|Windows Media Audio]] || .wma .WMA || http://example.org/test.wma |- ! Type !! URI scheme !! Sample link |- | [[:en:Internet Relay Chat|Internet Relay Chat]] || irc:// ircs:// || irc://example.org |- | [[:en:File Transfer Protocol|File Transfer Protocol]] || ftp:// || ftp://example.org |- | [[:en:Network News Transfer Protocol|Network News Transfer Protocol]] || news: || news:example.org |- | [[:en:Mailto|Mailto]] || mailto: || mailto:example@example.org |- | [[:en:HTTP Secure|HTTP Secure]] || https:// || https://example.org/test.html |- | [[:en:Apache Subversion|Apache Subversion]] || svn:// || svn://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Bitcoin|Bitcoin]] || bitcoin:// || bitcoin://example.org/ |- | [[:en:FTPS|FTPS]] || ftps:// || ftps://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Geo URI|Geo URI]] || geo: || geo:37.786971,-122.399677 |- | [[:en:Git (software)|Git]] || git:// || git://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Gopher (protocol)|Gopher]] || gopher:// || gopher://example.org |- | [[:en:Hypertext Transfer Protocol|Hypertext Transfer Protocol]] || http:// || http://example.org |- | [[:en:Magnet URI scheme|Magnet URI scheme]] || magnet:// || magnet://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Multimedia Messaging Service|Multimedia Messaging Service]] || mms:// || mms://example.org/ |- | [[:en:NASA World Wind|NASA World Wind]] || worldwind:// || worldwind://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Network News Transfer Protocol|Network News Transfer Protocol]] || nntp:// || nntp://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Secure Shell|Secure Shell]] || ssh:// || ssh://example.org/ |- | Secure [[Session Initiation Protocol]] || sips:// || sips://example.org/ |- | [[Session Initiation Protocol]] || sip:// || sip://example.org/ |- | [[Short Message Service]] || sms:// || sms://example.org/ |- | [[:en:SSH File Transfer Protocol|SSH File Transfer Protocol]] || sftp:// || sftp://example.org/ |- | Telephone || tel:// || tel://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Telnet|Telnet]] || telnet:// || telnet://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Uniform resource name|Uniform resource name]] || urn: || urn:isbn:0451450523 |- | [[:en:XMPP|XMPP]] || xmpp:// || xmpp://example.org/ |- |} == Hiding link icons == A link icon can be hidden with the {{code|plainlinks}} class or {{tl|Plain link}}, but this is not advisable. http://example.org/test.pdf == Custom link icons == Custom icons can be added by editing [[Special:MyPage/skin.css]] (current skin only) or [[Special:MyPage/common.css]] (all skins). For example, to add an icon for Excel files: #content a[href$=".xls"].external, #content a[href$=".XLS"].external, #content a[href$=".xlsx"].external, #content a[href$=".XLSX"].external { background: url("http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/ba/Page_white_excel.png") center right no-repeat; padding-right: 18px; } When successfully updated, this link will show an Excel icon: :http://example.org/test.xls The markup detects file extensions .xls or .xlsx with both upper and lower case. The image must be 16 pixels wide. The image link must be from http://upload.wikimedia.org. To get this link, go to the file page and click on the image to open it without the file description, then copy the URL. To remove a default icon, simply add the CSS with no URL. For example, to remove the padlock icon when viewing secure links: #content a[href ^="https://"].external { background: center right no-repeat; padding-right: 18px; } To remove all the default icons, use this CSS: #content a.external { background: none !important; padding: 0 !important; } == Bugs == * [[:bugzilla:20024|bug 20024]] - a destination-dependent icon should be shown for interwiki links * [[:bugzilla:30682|bug 30682]] - Link icon inconsistencies when using protocol relative URLs * [[:bugzilla:45891|bug 45891]] - External link icons should have alt text * [[:bugzilla:54604|bug 54604]] - Large number of CSS rules for external links * [[:bugzilla:61178]] - Remove yellow padlock icons on HTTPS links ([[MediaWiki_talk:Vector.css/Archive_1#Padlock_for_secure_links|related discussion for Enwiki]]) * [[:bugzilla:63521]] - Default external link icons should be a module == See also == {{commonscat|External link icons}} * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking#Non-English-language sites]] * [[Help:Link#External links]] * [[Wikipedia:External links]] == Notes == {{notelist|refs= {{efn|name=common.css|The default PDF icon is a generic document icon, but is changed to [[File:Icon pdf file.png]] through [[MediaWiki:Common.css|Common.css]].}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia link help]]

{{imbox | type = notice | name = info | text = In the default skin on desktop ([[mw:Skin:Vector|Vector]]), en.Wikipedia uses only two external link icons; one for [[:en:PDF|PDF]] documents and the other for all other external links. Some other skins use additional icons. }}{{Wikipedia how to}} {{ombox | image = [[File:Gnome-applications-science.svg|42px]] | text = You can test how this page looks in the different skins with these links:
{{select skin}}
}}{{Linking and page manipulation|linking and diffs}} External links usually display an icon at the end of the link. CSS is used to check for certain [[:en:Filename extension|Filename extension]]s or [[:en:URI scheme|URI scheme]]s and apply an icon specific to that file type, based on the selected [[Wikipedia:Skin|skin]].For example, [[WP:MONOBOOK|Monobook]] uses https://en.wikipedia.org/w/resources/src/mediawiki.skinning/images/external-ltr.svg and Vector uses https://en.wikipedia.org/w/skins/Vector/resources/common/images/external-link-ltr-icon.svg This page contains example URLs to demonstrate the link icons. The displayed icon only depends on the URL itself. It is not checked whether a file of that type is actually at the link. The examples here do not link to real files. == Explanation == [[:en:MediaWiki|MediaWiki]] software detects [[:en:URI scheme|URI scheme]]s and/or [[:en:Filename extension|Filename extension]]s to create a link; thus links without a URI will not have an external link applied. MediaWiki does not attempt to detect any part of the URL to create a link, such as {{code|www}}, which many websites do not use in the URL. The standard Wikipedia skin, ''[[WP:Vector|Vector]]'', shows only PDF icons, as does ''Cologne Blue''. ''Modern'', ''MonoBook'' and ''Timeless'' show a full set of filename extensions icons and some URI scheme icons; ''Minerva'' (mobile) shows none. Icons are defined in the CSS for each skin except for the PDF icon, which is displayed if ''"pdf"'' is anywhere in the filename extension.{{efn|name=common.css}} Filename extension icons are displayed only if the extension matches the text. Filename extension icons have precedence over URI scheme icons. Internet Explorer may show an empty space or misplaced icon if the page is rendered with a line wrap inside the link text. Link icons do not adhere to [[:en:MOS:ACCESS|accessibility standards]], since alt text cannot be added. == Example == {| class="wikitable" ! colspan=3 style="text-align:center;font-size:90%;font-weight:normal;"| [[File:Gnome-applications-science.svg|left|38px]] '''Use these links to view this page with a different skin:'''
{{select skin}} |- ! Type !! File extension !! Type !! URI scheme !! Sample link |- | [[:en:Internet Relay Chat|Internet Relay Chat]] || irc:// ircs:// || irc://example.org |- | [[:en:File Transfer Protocol|File Transfer Protocol]] || ftp:// || ftp://example.org |- | [[:en:Network News Transfer Protocol|Network News Transfer Protocol]] || news: || news:example.org |- | [[:en:Mailto|Mailto]] || mailto: || mailto:example@example.org |- | [[:en:HTTP Secure|HTTP Secure]] || https:// || https://example.org/test.html |- | [[:en:Apache Subversion|Apache Subversion]] || svn:// || svn://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Bitcoin|Bitcoin]] || bitcoin:// || bitcoin://example.org/ |- | [[:en:FTPS|FTPS]] || ftps:// || ftps://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Geo URI|Geo URI]] || geo: || geo:37.786971,-122.399677 |- | [[:en:Git (software)|Git]] || git:// || git://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Gopher (protocol)|Gopher]] || gopher:// || gopher://example.org |- | [[:en:Hypertext Transfer Protocol|Hypertext Transfer Protocol]] || http:// || http://example.org |- | [[:en:Magnet URI scheme|Magnet URI scheme]] || magnet:// || magnet://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Multimedia Messaging Service|Multimedia Messaging Service]] || mms:// || mms://example.org/ |- | [[:en:NASA World Wind|NASA World Wind]] || worldwind:// || worldwind://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Network News Transfer Protocol|Network News Transfer Protocol]] || nntp:// || nntp://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Secure Shell|Secure Shell]] || ssh:// || ssh://example.org/ |- | Secure [[:en:Session Initiation Protocol|Session Initiation Protocol]] || sips:// || sips://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Session Initiation Protocol|Session Initiation Protocol]] || sip:// || sip://example.org/ |- | [[Short Message Service]] || sms:// || sms://example.org/ |- | [[:en:SSH File Transfer Protocol|SSH File Transfer Protocol]] || sftp:// || sftp://example.org/ |- | Telephone || tel:// || tel://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Telnet|Telnet]] || telnet:// || telnet://example.org/ |- | [[:en:Uniform resource name|Uniform resource name]] || urn: || urn:isbn:0451450523 |- | [[:en:XMPP|XMPP]] || xmpp:// || xmpp://example.org/ |- |} == Hiding link icons == A link icon can be hidden with the {{code|plainlinks}} class or {{tl|Plain link}}, but this is not advisable. http://example.org/test.pdf == Custom link icons == Custom icons can be added by editing [[Special:MyPage/skin.css]] (current skin only) or [[Special:MyPage/common.css]] (all skins). For example, to add an icon for Excel files: #content a[href$=".xls"].external, #content a[href$=".XLS"].external, #content a[href$=".xlsx"].external, #content a[href$=".XLSX"].external { background: url("http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/ba/Page_white_excel.png") center right no-repeat; padding-right: 18px; } When successfully updated, this link will show an Excel icon: :http://example.org/test.xls The markup detects file extensions .xls or .xlsx with both upper and lower case. The image must be 16 pixels wide. The image link must be from http://upload.wikimedia.org. To get this link, go to the file page and click on the image to open it without the file description, then copy the URL. To remove a default icon, simply add the CSS with no URL. For example, to remove the padlock icon when viewing secure links: #content a[href ^="https://"].external { background: center right no-repeat; padding-right: 18px; } To remove all the default icons, use this CSS: #content a.external { background: none !important; padding: 0 !important; } == Bugs == * [[:bugzilla:20024|bug 20024]] - a destination-dependent icon should be shown for interwiki links * [[:bugzilla:30682|bug 30682]] - Link icon inconsistencies when using protocol relative URLs * [[:bugzilla:45891|bug 45891]] - External link icons should have alt text * [[:bugzilla:54604|bug 54604]] - Large number of CSS rules for external links * [[:bugzilla:61178]] - Remove yellow padlock icons on HTTPS links ([[MediaWiki_talk:Vector.css/Archive_1#Padlock_for_secure_links|related discussion for Enwiki]]) * [[:bugzilla:63521]] - Default external link icons should be a module == See also == {{commonscat|External link icons}} * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking#Non-English-language sites]] * [[Help:Link#External links]] * [[Wikipedia:External links]] == Notes == {{notelist|refs= {{efn|name=common.css|The default PDF icon is a generic document icon, but is changed to [[File:Icon pdf file.png]] through [[MediaWiki:Common.css|Common.css]].}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia link help]]
